title: Printer Sales & Consulting
shortDescription: Expert guidance to help you choose the right printer for your business needs and budget.
description: Our sales consultants work closely with you to understand your printing requirements and recommend the best solutions. From home offices to enterprise environments, we match you with the perfect printer from brands like Canon, Epson, Lenovo, Dell, HP, and more.

title: Managed Print Services & Leasing
shortDescription: Comprehensive print management, rental, and leasing solutions to reduce costs and optimize your fleet.
description: Our Managed Print Services (MPS) provide end-to-end management of your printing infrastructure. We monitor, maintain, and optimize your entire print fleet, reducing costs by up to 30%. We also offer flexible leasing plans — enjoy the latest technology without the upfront investment, with maintenance and support included.

title: Annual Maintenance Contract (AMC)
shortDescription: Protect your investment with comprehensive annual maintenance contracts for all your printers.
description: Our Annual Maintenance Contracts (AMC) provide peace of mind with scheduled maintenance, priority support, and cost-predictable printer management. We offer customized AMC plans for single machines or entire fleets, covering all major brands including Canon, Epson, HP, Lenovo, and Dell.

title: Register for Warranty
shortDescription: Register your products for official manufacturer warranty and extended protection plans.
description: As an authorized dealer for Canon, Epson, HP, Lenovo, Dell, DJI, and Godox, we help you register your products for official manufacturer warranty. We also offer extended warranty plans for additional peace of mind and protection beyond the standard coverage period.

title: Repair & Maintenance
shortDescription: Fast, reliable repair service for all major printer brands with genuine parts.
description: Our certified technicians provide expert diagnosis and repair for all major printer brands. We use only genuine parts and offer quick turnaround times to minimize your downtime. From routine maintenance to complex repairs, we've got you covered.
features: Expert diagnosis of all printer issues

title: Consumables & Supplies
shortDescription: Genuine ink, toner, and paper supplies from authorized sources at competitive prices.
description: Keep your printers running at peak performance with our range of genuine consumables. As authorized dealers for Canon, Epson, and HP, we guarantee authentic ink cartridges, toner, and specialty papers at competitive prices with fast delivery across Tanzania.

title: Spare Parts & Components
shortDescription: Genuine and compatible spare parts for all major printer brands and models.
description: We stock a comprehensive range of genuine spare parts and components for all major printer brands. From fusers, rollers, and print heads to paper feed assemblies and maintenance kits, we ensure your printers stay operational with the right parts, fast.

title: IT & Network Setup
shortDescription: Professional installation and network integration for your printing infrastructure.
description: Our IT specialists ensure your printers are properly installed, configured, and integrated into your network. We handle everything from basic USB setups to complex enterprise network printer deployments with security configurations.
